title: Dark Mode Book
description: Decreases the book GUI's exposure so it doesn't hurt your eyes!
body:
Did you know you can change the color of text in books? If you put §f before text, it will turn white. Which is a problem because it's almost impossible to read.

This pack darkens the book GUI texture so you can read all text, useful for seeing text on a server where someone wants to make you unwillingly sign a bad contract!

![Contract Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb3a7d8d7b6ddc3bdce3ecee2725f99c1baa24ba.png)

['Scribble' makes it easier to format text in books to your liking!](https://modrinth.com/mod/scribble)
